verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Joy unspeakable down inside my soul Joy unspeakable down inside my soul

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's running deep, it's running wide It's running over down inside Earthly things cannot replace this happiness I feel It comes from Jesus Christ A comforting so real

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It will be full, it will remain It melts the sorrow and all pain I will count it all for good when facing darkness night I know He'll restore my soul With the morning light

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Joy sweet joy Joy sweet joy Joy sweet joy Joy, joy, joy, joy down in my heart

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've got joy I've got joy I've got joy way down inside my soul Down inside my soul
